title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 4–7, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We can work on it!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's no use! The most important part is...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Before you kill her, you have to hypnotize her...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And make her write my name into the will!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: "I will leave all my wealth to my Butler, Clahador."!"!"!"!"!"!"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This way, I can openly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Claim her wealth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've spent three years getting everyone to trust me,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And as soon as she writes the will, no one will suspect me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Just for this you spent three years being a butler...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If I were you, I would have just robbed them straight on!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If I had done that, I'd still be an outlaw, and the marines would still be chasing me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This plan can get me tons of money, plus I won't have the marines chasing me

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I like using my head to find a peace- full way to settle things!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hahahaha! Peaceful way to settle things?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You mean murdering her entire family is a peaceful way?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey! What entire family? Kaya's parents died naturally!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That was outside my plans!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Whatever, let's not argue over this.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Anyways, you just need to send the signal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Our ship has been anchored close by...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For almost a week!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They can't hold back any longer....

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: horrible... I've heard a horrible plan...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey! What's going on? This doesn't look good!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Isn't he listen- ing?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Of course it doesn't look good! They're serious about this!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So, for three years...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They already Lusted after Kaya's family wealth!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And that Butler... NO! Captain Kuro is still alive...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And I punched him before... He'll kill me for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Kaya will be killed too! The village will be under attack....

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Not good... not good at all!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
